page_info: The page displays a news article titled 'Healthcare Advances in 2024'. At the top right, there is a search input field (id: AAAL) containing the text 'Healthcare Advances in 2024'. Below the article content, there are two buttons: 'Back' and 'Add to Personalized News' (id: AAEv).
thoughts: The user goal is to type 'Healthcare Advances in 2024' into the input field and click the button to add it to personalized news. While the text has been entered into the input field at the top of the page, the button 'Add to Personalized News' is still visible and has not been clicked yet to finalize the submission. There is no confirmation message or change in the button's state to indicate that the topic has been successfully added/submitted.
